mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE(MS_NUM, MS_CONTENT, MS_SENDER_NUM, MS_RECEIVER_NUM, TET_NUM) VALUES(#{msNum}, #{msContent}, #{msSenderNum}, #{msReceiverNum}, #{tetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT M.MS_NUM, M.MS_CONTENT, M.MS_SENDDATE, M.MS_CHECK, M.MS_SENDER_NUM, M.MS_RECEIVER_NUM, U.USER_NAME AS msSenderName FROM MESSAGE M LEFT JOIN USERS U ON M.MS_SENDER_NUM = U.USER_NUM WHERE M.MS_RECEIVER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY M.MS_CHECK ASC, M.MS_SENDDATE DESC

SELECT M.MS_NUM, M.MS_CONTENT, M.MS_SENDDATE, M.MS_CHECK, M.MS_SENDER_NUM, M.MS_RECEIVER_NUM, U.USER_NAME AS msSenderName FROM MESSAGE M LEFT JOIN USERS U ON M.MS_SENDER_NUM = U.USER_NUM WHERE M.MS_NUM = #{msNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSAGE WHERE MS_RECEIVER_NUM = #{userNum} AND MS_CHECK = 'N'
SELECT MAX(ER.ER_PASS) FROM EXAM_RESULT ER JOIN TEST T ON ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM WHERE T.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} AND ER.USER_NUM = #{userNum}
